---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or crash.
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

### Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps To Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

### Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Screenshots/recordings

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. Please upload them directly to GitHub instead of linking to
an external site.

### Log

If you have any relevant log output, please include it here. If the log is quite long, consider uploading it as a file
to GitHub instead of pasting it directly into the issue.

### Environment

- Device: [e.g. Pixel 8]
- OS/ROM: [e.g. Stock Android 16, GrapheneOS 16]
- Truvark version: [e.g. 2.0.3]

### Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
